description: align_engines: multiple connectors in one run. Combines all five single-connector cases (topdesk, protectwise, jamf, fidelis, cisco-umbrella) into one connectors tree and runs the patch over ALL of them at once (no --path restriction). Every profile's engine trio is merged into one fields block; every engine_group token is renamed to engineGroup (connection field id + engine_mode dropdown key; triggers value + effect id + child id; serializer field_mappings id, including prefixed variants); engine + engineGroup get create/edit required: true.
